channel.title: Device-Driver on Kayra Sari
channel.description: Recent content in Device-Driver on Kayra Sari

item.title: Excalibur WMI Kernel Module: Writing a Real Linux Driver From Scratch
item.description: How I reverse-engineered my laptop's WMI firmware protocol, discovered an undocumented rainbow mode at 0x7, and rewrote the driver architecture from global variables to a proper per-zone state machine.
